ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "imdb_title_id" TEXT /* IMDB title ID */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the movie was published */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movie */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "spoiler_alert" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_and_crew" (
  "cast_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast/crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast/crew member is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cast/crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the cast/crew member (e.g., actor, director) */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cast/crew member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cast/crew member information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_and_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the actor is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the actor (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the actor information was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the actor information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "avg_vote" REAL /* Average vote rating */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "usa_gross_income" REAL /* USA gross income */,
  "worldwide_gross_income" REAL /* Worldwide gross income */,
  "metascore" REAL /* Metascore */,
  "reviews_from_users" INTEGER /* Number of reviews from users */,
  "reviews_from_critics" INTEGER /* Number of reviews from critics */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_rating" REAL /* Rotten Tomatoes rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
